_comment: CMS NCCI Procedure-to-Procedure (PTP) edit pairs — column 1 cannot be billed with column 2 without modifier
_source: CMS NCCI PTP Table — cms.gov (public domain)
_note: Production upgrade: replace this file contents by running scripts/refresh_cms_data.py on Jan 1 and Oct 1 each year (BS-7 auto-refresh)
_modifier_exempt: Modifier 59 or X{EPSU} may override some pairs — marked modifier_allowed: true

pairs.reason: E&M same-day duplicate — only one E&M level per provider per day
E&M same-day duplicate — only one E&M level per provider per day
E&M same-day duplicate — only one E&M level per provider per day
Venipuncture conflict — 36416 (fingerstick) is component of 36415 (venipuncture)
ECG component bundling — 93005 (tracing only) is component of 93000 (complete ECG)
ECG component bundling — 93010 (interpretation only) is component of 93000 (complete ECG)
Chest X-ray — 71045 (1 view) is component of 71046 (2 views)
Chest X-ray — 71046 (2 views) is component of 71048 (4 views)
E&M same-day duplicate — only one E&M level per provider per day
Subsequent hospital E&M duplicate — only one level per day
Subsequent hospital E&M duplicate — only one level per day
Upper GI endoscopy with biopsy bundles diagnostic endoscopy — modifier 59 may apply if separate session
Colonoscopy with polypectomy bundles diagnostic colonoscopy — modifier 59 may apply if separate lesion
Knee arthroscopy — meniscectomy bundles diagnostic arthroscopy
Total knee arthroplasty bundles unicompartmental replacement
Major joint injection bundles small joint injection — modifier 59 if different joint
Major joint injection bundles intermediate joint injection — modifier 59 if different joint
Debridement codes overlap — active wound management vs surgical debridement
Therapeutic exercise and therapeutic activities cannot be billed together same day same provider
PT evaluation and re-evaluation cannot be billed same day
Psychotherapy 60-min and 45-min cannot be billed same day same patient
Family psychotherapy with patient and individual psychotherapy cannot be billed same session
Therapeutic injection — subcutaneous and IV push cannot be billed for same drug same encounter
CBC with differential bundles CBC without differential
Comprehensive metabolic panel bundles basic metabolic panel
Comprehensive metabolic panel bundles basic metabolic panel (calcium, ionized)
Lipid panel bundles cholesterol test — cannot bill separately
Lipid panel bundles HDL cholesterol — cannot bill separately
ED E&M duplicate — only one ED visit level per encounter
ED E&M duplicate — only one ED visit level per encounter
